title: wendlandia tinctoria var. normalis
intro: Wendlandia tinctoria var. normalis, also known as the Indian gentian, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Wendlandia tinctoria var. normalis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infectious diseases. The herbal preparations of this plant include decoctions, infusions, and powders, which are used to treat a range of health conditions, including digestive disorders and respiratory infections.
